title: Estate management: competency framework and relevant training
body: "‘Estate management competency  framework’ helps schools to recruit and develop the essential levels of skills and competencies for estate management roles.  ‘Training and qualifications relevant to estate management’ provides information on training, qualifications and the support available.  These documents are useful if you have responsibility for overseeing or managing the school estate. This includes:   proprietors, leaders and governors of schools charity trustees of academies and academy trusts trustees of schools school business professionals those with responsibility for the day-to-day running of the school estate local authorities diocesan authorities and other religious authorities and bodies  "
